---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  contents:
    - posts/*/index.qmd
    - "!personal/**"
  type: table
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title]
  date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
  table-hover: true
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
---

<br>
[<i class="bi bi-lock-fill"></i> Personal Blog](personal/index.html){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm .rounded-pill}
